title: Parent to Parent Networking * Substance Use Disorder Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parent to Parent Networking * Substance Use Disorder Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Fathers Foster Parents Perinatal Depression Substance Use Disorder Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES ABC PARENT MENTOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer mentoring to parents impacted by addiction who are involved in ODHS Child Welfare and criminal justice system. Parents are matched with a mentor who helps them stay on track, work through child welfare system and complete substance abuse treatment. Mentors help connect parents to recovery communities. The program is a part of Parents Anonymous Oregon. 7820 NE Holman Street Suite B5 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Available to any parent who: -Has an open Child Welfare case due to substance abuse -Is currently in treatment for substance abuse -Is reuniting with their children after successful treatment Hours: Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 258-4590 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM PARENT MENTOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer mentoring to parents impacted by addiction who are involved in ODHS Child Welfare and criminal justice system. Parents are matched with a mentor who helps them stay on track, work through child welfare system and complete substance abuse treatment. Mentors help connect parents to recovery communities. The program is a part of Parents Anonymous Oregon. 3857 Wolverine Street NE Suite 22 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Available to any parent who: -Has an open Child Welfare case due to substance abuse -Is currently in treatment for substance abuse -Is reuniting with their children after successful treatment Hours: Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 258-4685 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES PARENT MENTOR PROGRAM MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES PARENT MENTOR PROGRAM
